name: write-off-unpaid-invoices

scripts.package: pnpm build && cd target && zip -qr write-off-unpaid-invoices.zip ./*.js.map ./*.js
scripts.buildcheck:all: pnpm --filter aws buildcheck && pnpm --filter logger buildcheck && pnpm --filter bigquery buildcheck && pnpm --filter zuora buildcheck && pnpm --filter internationalisation buildcheck && pnpm --filter product-catalog buildcheck && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog buildcheck && pnpm --filter promotions buildcheck && pnpm --filter write-off-unpaid-invoices buildcheck && pnpm buildcheck
scripts.type-check:all: pnpm --filter aws type-check && pnpm --filter logger type-check && pnpm --filter bigquery type-check && pnpm --filter zuora type-check && pnpm --filter internationalisation type-check && pnpm --filter product-catalog type-check && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog type-check && pnpm --filter promotions type-check && pnpm --filter write-off-unpaid-invoices type-check && pnpm type-check
scripts.lint:all: pnpm --filter aws lint && pnpm --filter logger lint && pnpm --filter bigquery lint && pnpm --filter zuora lint && pnpm --filter internationalisation lint && pnpm --filter product-catalog lint && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog lint && pnpm --filter promotions lint && pnpm --filter write-off-unpaid-invoices lint && pnpm lint
scripts.check-formatting:all: pnpm --filter aws check-formatting && pnpm --filter logger check-formatting && pnpm --filter bigquery check-formatting && pnpm --filter zuora check-formatting && pnpm --filter internationalisation check-formatting && pnpm --filter product-catalog check-formatting && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog check-formatting && pnpm --filter promotions check-formatting && pnpm --filter write-off-unpaid-invoices check-formatting && pnpm check-formatting
scripts.test:all: pnpm --filter aws test && pnpm --filter logger test && pnpm --filter bigquery test && pnpm --filter zuora test && pnpm --filter internationalisation test && pnpm --filter product-catalog test && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog test && pnpm --filter promotions test && pnpm --filter write-off-unpaid-invoices test && pnpm test
